name: UGC Video Ad Capabilities
description: Shared, reusable capabilities the video-ad orchestrator composes to render short-form ads locally (Seedance 2.0 reference-to-video render engine + the render QC gate). The per-format recipes are NOT skills — each ad format is a TEMPLATE (data) in the ad_sample DB (recipe = the capabilities it uses + its instructions + config + brand-input contract). The goose-video composite reads a template from the DB and runs these capabilities. Removed the per-format create-*/remix-* template-skills (they belong in the DB, not the skill library).
